data.content: Implemented thinking detail toggle for both Agent History View and Terminal Panel. Agent History: added thinkingDetailVisible state to InteractionPickerState with filterEntry integration that hides user (tool result) and system type response entries when detail is off (messageTypeFilters take precedence when active). Terminal Panel: added stateful line filter (terminal-detail-filter.ts) that strips numbered file content lines matching /\s+\d+[→│]/ pattern. Filter is applied during both buffer replay and live SSE events. Toggle change triggers full xterm re-render via useEffect dependency. Both views show a Detail Switch toggle in their toolbars. Tests: 12 unit tests covering numbered line stripping, ANSI handling, chunk boundary splits, and reset behavior. All quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, typecheck clean, 2156 tests pass, build succeeds). Commits merged to main and pushed to origin.
